title: High Press Detected
summary: Blue City are pressing the first pass aggressively and forcing rushed clearances.
analysis: Blue City have synchronized their front three to lock the center and jump on the fullback outlet, turning rest defense into immediate territorial pressure.
child_summary: Blue City are chasing the ball together so the other team cannot pass calmly.

title: Tactical Yellow Card
summary: A deliberate foul stopped Blue City's transition before the midfield line was broken.
analysis: The caution matters because Crimson United chose to halt the break before the press could be bypassed.
child_summary: The player pulled the attack back on purpose, so the referee showed a yellow card.

title: Goal Disallowed For Offside
summary: The attacker moved beyond the second-last defender before the pass was played.
analysis: The forward attacked early against a stepping line, so the finish counted only after the assistant's timing check failed.
child_summary: The scorer ran a little too early before the pass.

title: Dangerous Attack
summary: Blue City overloaded the left side and created a cutback lane across the box.
analysis: The danger came from pinning the fullback and pulling the near center-back wide, which opened the inside channel.
child_summary: Blue City moved defenders away and made a good space near goal.

title: Blue City Take The Lead
summary: The goal came after repeated left-side overloads finally opened a clean cutback finish.
analysis: Blue City kept creating the same advantage until Crimson United's far-side tracking broke too late.
child_summary: Blue City kept attacking the same space until they found an easy shot.

title: Brief Injury Stoppage
summary: A central midfielder is receiving treatment after a collision and play has slowed.
analysis: The stoppage matters because it interrupts Crimson United's pressing rhythm and may force an earlier change.
child_summary: A player got hurt, so the game is stopping for a moment.

title: Formation Change Detected
summary: Crimson United have shifted into a back three to free both wing-backs higher.
analysis: The shape change is designed to widen Blue City's press and create more direct access into the half-spaces.
child_summary: Crimson United changed their shape so more players can attack the sides.

title: Penalty Awarded
summary: The defender made contact before winning the ball and stopped the shot path.
analysis: The recovery run was late, the tackle line came across the attacker, and the defender clipped the player before clean ball contact was possible.
child_summary: The defender hit the player first instead of getting the ball first.

title: VAR Review Confirmed
summary: VAR checked the penalty contact and confirmed the on-field decision.
analysis: The review matters because it validates the foul sequence after replay showed the defender clipped the attacker first.
child_summary: The video check agreed that the foul happened.

title: Momentum Shift
summary: Crimson United have started winning second balls and pinning Blue City deeper.
analysis: The substitution refreshed the press, restored counterpressure, and turned midfield duels into sustained field tilt.
child_summary: Crimson United are getting stronger and keeping Blue City near their own goal.

title: Counterattack Break
summary: Crimson United broke immediately after regaining the ball and attacked the unprotected flank.
analysis: The transition succeeded because Blue City's rest defense was stretched after committing both fullbacks high.
child_summary: Crimson United won the ball and ran into open space very quickly.

title: Tactical Substitution
summary: A fresh winger has been added to attack the wide channel behind the fullback.
analysis: The change shifts the attack toward direct isolation on the flank, aiming to stretch the back line and create deeper cutback zones.
child_summary: The coach brought on a fast player to attack the side spaces.

title: Late Red Card
summary: A last-defender foul stopped a clear breakaway and the referee showed a red card.
analysis: The dismissal changes the endgame because Crimson United must finish with ten players while chasing the match.
child_summary: The player stopped a big chance unfairly, so the referee sent them off.
